item.title: Drug Scandal, Budget Debate, AI, Sports
item.ns0:title: Drug Scandal, Budget Debate, AI, Sports
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, the political firestorm in the House of Assembly reaches a new peak as the Speaker moves to expunge records amid explosive allegations involving a "politician number one" and a US drug investigation. We investigate a suspected arson attack that has left a local family homeless and bring you the details of a major six-figure drug bust on the high seas near Andros. Our team also examines a stark new security warning from the US Embassy regarding watercraft rentals and reports on a multi-million dollar acquisition set to revitalize a key tourism hub in Grand Bahama. Plus, stay tuned for a critical heat advisory update and the latest highlights from the world of sports.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News, the political firestorm in the House of Assembly reaches a new peak as the Speaker moves to expunge records amid explosive allegations involving a "politician number one" and a US drug investigation. We investigate a suspected arson attack that has left a local family homeless and bring you the details of a major six-figure drug bust on the high seas near Andros. Our team also examines a stark new security warning from the US Embassy regarding watercraft rentals and reports on a multi-million dollar acquisition set to revitalize a key tourism hub in Grand Bahama. Plus, stay tuned for a critical heat advisory update and the latest highlights from the world of sports.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, the political firestorm in the House of Assembly reaches a new peak as the Speaker moves to expunge records amid explosive allegations involving a "politician number one" and a US drug investigation. We investigate a suspected arson attack that has left a local family homeless and bring you the details of a major six-figure drug bust on the high seas near Andros. Our team also examines a stark new security warning from the US Embassy regarding watercraft rentals and reports on a multi-million dollar acquisition set to revitalize a key tourism hub in Grand Bahama. Plus, stay tuned for a critical heat advisory update and the latest highlights from the world of sports.
-----

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
